synthesis_text: COVID-19 is a contagious disease caused by the coronavirus SARS-CoV-2 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. It is mainly transmitted from person to person through inhaling air contaminated by droplets/aerosols and small airborne particles containing the virus [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024]. The disease can cause respiratory symptoms [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00010] and was declared a global health emergency by the World Health Organization (WHO) [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].

COVID-19 is an illness caused by the virus severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. It spreads between people in close contact, mainly through the air in tiny droplets of fluid [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. Most people have mild illness or no symptoms, but older adults and people with certain medical conditions are at higher risk of serious illness [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].

COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by a coronavirus called SARS-CoV-2 [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. It is also known as coronavirus disease, with 'CO' standing for corona, 'VI' for virus, and 'D' for disease [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
